data.title: Solana evolved into a payment settlement layer
data.description:
Solana established itself as a chain for settlement and payments, surpassing the growth of other networks and fintech apps in 2025.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/solana-evolved-into-a-payment-settlement-layer/

data.title: Crypto devs accused of rug pull blame Iran draft for abandoning project
data.description:
The MONTRA token's market cap dropped from $100K to $20K, and the Montra Finance website now displays a 404 error page.
source: https://protos.com/crypto-devs-accused-of-rug-pull-blame-iran-draft-for-abandoning-project/

data.title: Wall Street Bigwig Morgan Stanley Enlists Coinbase And BNY Mellon For Custody Of Upcoming Bitcoin ETF
data.description:
Morgan Stanley, ranked in the U. S. by total assets, plans to store its Bitcoin with Coinbase Custody and BNY.
source: https://zycrypto.com/wall-street-bigwig-morgan-stanley-enlists-coinbase-and-bny-mellon-for-custody-of-upcoming-bitcoin-etf/

data.title: USDC Treasury Wallet Mints 250 Million USDC
data.description: A recent transaction has resulted in the minting of 250 million USDC at the USDC Treasury wallet. According to NS3.AI, this minting activity has led to an increase in the on-chain supply of USDC held by the Treasury.

data.title: Swiss Foreign Minister Comments on Arms Exports Amid Neutrality Debate
data.description: Swiss Foreign Minister stated that Switzerland will assess the situation based on the duration of the conflict when questioned about whether the country should halt arms exports due to its neutral stance. According to Jin10, the minister emphasized the importance of evaluating the ongoing conflict to make informed decisions regarding arms exports. This statement comes amid discussions on Switzerland's long-standing policy of neutrality and its implications on international arms trade.

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Bowman Observes Labor Market Stability
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman has noted signs of increased stability in the labor market. According to ChainCatcher, Bowman's observations come amid ongoing assessments of economic conditions by the Federal Reserve. The stability in the labor market is a key factor in the central bank's decision-making process regarding monetary policy.

data.title: US 10-Year Yield Rises 20 bps Since Friday
data.description: Jim Bianco, president of Bianco Research posted on X, the US 10-year yield has increased by 20 basis points since Friday's close, marking the largest rise in 11 months.

data.title: CNN's Independence Assured Amid Warner Bros. Discovery Acquisition
data.description: David Ellison has moved to assure CNN journalists that the network will maintain its editorial independence following the acquisition of its parent company, Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Ellison's commitment to upholding journalistic integrity and resisting any potential influence from U.S. President Donald Trump's administration. This reassurance comes amid concerns about media independence in the face of corporate acquisitions and political pressures. Ellison emphasized that CNN will continue to operate without interference, ensuring that its news coverage remains unbiased and independent.

data.title: EU Continues Diplomatic Efforts to Resolve Conflict
data.description: The European Union's High Representative for Foreign Affairs and Security Policy, Kallas, has stated that discussions aimed at achieving a diplomatic resolution will persist. According to Jin10, these talks are focused on exploring ways to end the ongoing conflict. The EU remains committed to finding peaceful solutions through dialogue and negotiation, emphasizing the importance of diplomacy in addressing international disputes.

data.title: EU Official Accuses Iran of Indiscriminate Attacks on Other Nations
data.description: The European Union's High Representative for Foreign Affairs and Security Policy, Josep Borrell, has accused Iran of carrying out indiscriminate attacks on other countries. According to Jin10, Borrell's statement highlights growing concerns over Iran's actions on the international stage. The EU official's remarks come amid heightened tensions in the region, as various nations express unease over Iran's military activities. Borrell emphasized the need for diplomatic efforts to address these issues and prevent further escalation. The EU continues to monitor the situation closely, urging all parties involved to engage in constructive dialogue to ensure regional stability.

data.title: PEI Licensing Sues Pudgy Penguins NFT Brand for Trademark Infringement
data.description: PEI Licensing, the owner of the Penguin apparel brand, has filed a lawsuit against the Pudgy Penguins NFT brand, alleging trademark infringement. According to NS3.AI, the legal action follows a retail initiative by the NFT project, which resulted in the sale of over one million toys and the launch of apparel products. PEI Licensing claims that Pudgy Penguins disregarded a cease-and-desist letter issued in October 2023, leading to the dilution of the Penguin brand's value, which has been established since 1955. The company is seeking monetary damages, including all profits from the contested sales, and has requested a jury trial.

data.title: Mediterranean Shipping Company to Implement Fuel Surcharge on Northern Europe to Red Sea and East Africa Routes
data.description: Mediterranean Shipping Company (MSC) has announced the introduction of a fuel surcharge on all cargo transported from Northern Europe, including the UK, Scandinavia, and the Baltic regions, to the Red Sea and East Africa. According to Jin10, this decision comes as part of MSC's efforts to address rising fuel costs and maintain operational efficiency. The surcharge, known as the Energy Fuel Surcharge (EFS), will be applied to shipments along these routes. MSC's move reflects broader industry trends as shipping companies adjust pricing strategies in response to fluctuating fuel prices. The implementation of the EFS aims to ensure the sustainability of services amid ongoing economic challenges.

data.title: Military Withdrawal Plan Raises Concerns Over Future Stability
data.description: The Long View, institutional investor, posted on X. Concerns have been raised regarding a proposed military withdrawal plan, which critics argue could leave the forces financially strained, lacking leadership, and with diminished military capabilities. The discussion highlights the potential risks associated with the withdrawal strategy, emphasizing the need for careful consideration of the long-term impacts on military strength and stability.

data.title: Poland's Orlen Receives Force Majeure Notice from Qatar Energy on LNG Shipments
data.description: Poland's Orlen has been informed by Qatar Energy about potential disruptions to liquefied natural gas (LNG) shipments scheduled for April and early May. According to Jin10, the notice cites force majeure, indicating that these shipments may be canceled or delayed. The development raises concerns about energy supply stability and highlights the challenges faced by global energy markets.

data.title: OpenAI Reports Issues with ChatGPT
data.description: OpenAI has announced that its ChatGPT platform is currently experiencing problems. According to Jin10, the company has not specified the nature of the issues or provided a timeline for resolution. Users have reported difficulties accessing the service, leading to concerns about the reliability of AI-driven applications. OpenAI is actively working to address the situation and restore normal functionality. The incident highlights the challenges faced by AI developers in maintaining seamless operations and the importance of robust infrastructure in supporting advanced technologies.

data.title: Iceland to Propose Referendum on EU Membership Talks
data.description: Iceland's government plans to propose a referendum in the fall to decide whether to resume negotiations for joining the European Union. According to Jin10, this information was reported by the radio station RUV, citing unnamed sources. The potential referendum reflects ongoing discussions within Iceland about the benefits and drawbacks of EU membership. The decision to hold a public vote underscores the importance of public opinion in shaping the country's foreign policy direction.

data.title: Heathrow Airport Faces Operational Challenges Amid Mideast Conflict
data.description: London Heathrow Airport is experiencing significant operational challenges due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the airport is dealing with numerous flight cancellations and a large number of parked aircraft. The situation is causing disruptions at one of the world's busiest airports, as it navigates the complexities brought on by the geopolitical tensions. The airport's management is working to address these challenges while ensuring the safety and efficiency of its operations.

data.title: Pi Coin Rises 16% to $0.199, But Analysts Warn of Potential Pullback
data.description:
Pi Coin has experienced a notable increase, climbing 16% within 24 hours to reach $0.199, approaching the $0.200 mark. According to NS3.AI, despite this upward movement, there are indications that the rally may not sustain. Analysts have identified bearish divergence in the Chaikin Money Flow and an RSI nearing 70.0, which suggest weakening inflows and potential profit-taking.

The presence of an ascending flag pattern further implies that Pi Coin's price might retest support levels around $0.175, $0.159, and possibly $0.150. However, a break above $0.200 driven by Pi Day celebrations could push the price toward $0.215, potentially reigniting the rally.

data.title: Mutuum Finance Raises $20.7 Million for Decentralized Lending Protocol
data.description:
Mutuum Finance (MUTM) is advancing its decentralized, non-custodial lending and borrowing protocol on the Ethereum blockchain. According to NS3.AI, the project has successfully raised over $20.7 million from more than 19,000 supporters. The V1 protocol is currently operational on the Sepolia testnet, showcasing simulated liquidity exceeding $180 million in total value locked. It features Safe-Mode Borrow Presets designed to manage loan-to-value risk effectively.

The project intends to utilize Chainlink-based oracle infrastructure with fallback mechanisms for accurate pricing. Additionally, the token and lending contracts have undergone reviews by CertiK and Halborn, ensuring enhanced security and reliability.

data.title: Energy Market Disruption: LNG Shipping Rates Surge Amid US-Israeli Conflict
data.description: LNG shipping spot rates on the U.S. Gulf–Europe route have surged from approximately $40,000 to around $300,000 per day due to the ongoing US-Israeli conflict with Iran, impacting global energy markets. According to NS3.AI, the Strait of Hormuz, responsible for about 20% of the world's oil transit, has been effectively closed since U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran commenced on Saturday. Brent crude experienced a significant increase, settling at $81.40 per barrel following a 4.7% rise in a single session. Additionally, U.S. stocks have seen declines over the past week, while the DXY dollar index has reached 99.
